violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of bio-film. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC disposed of ice. Ice machine to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized before use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was disposed of. Ice machine must be washed, rinsed, and sanitzed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Cutting board was disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2024
